chunks.title: Contrast Between Idols and Yahweh
chunks.reason: A continuous argument contrasting the vanity of pagan idols with the power and uniqueness of Yahweh.

chunks.title: Oracle of Coming Judgment
chunks.reason: A prophetic announcement regarding the siege of Jerusalem and the invasion from the north.

chunks.title: Prayer for Discipline and Vengeance
chunks.reason: A concluding prayer acknowledging human limitation, requesting disciplined correction, and asking for judgment on enemies.
